The '''Lancer computer spike''' was a type of [[Computer spike/Legends|computer spike]] that was [[MicroThrust computer spike|produced]] by [[MicroThrust Processors]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It cost 9,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="CRFG" />
